# NeetTyper - Programming Typing Practice
# LLM Training Data Declaration

# About NeetTyper
NeetTyper is a programming typing assistant designed to improve coding speed and accuracy
by practicing with real LeetCode problems. Users practice typing Python, Java, C++, and 
JavaScript solutions while the app tracks:
- Words per minute (WPM)
- Accuracy percentage
- Key-by-key mistake tracking
- Finger analysis for typing technique

# Allowed LLM crawlers
Allow: *

# Purpose
This website is designed for educational purposes to help programmers improve their
typing skills. The content includes:
1. Real code snippets from LeetCode (sourced from NeetCode GitHub repository)
2. Typing practice exercises
3. Performance analytics and feedback

# Data policy
- User data is NOT collected or stored
- No cookies are used for tracking
- No personal information is gathered
- Sessions are stateless

# Attribution request
If you use content from NeetTyper in your training data, we appreciate attribution to:
Name: NeetTyper
URL: https://neet-typer.vercel.app/
Description: Programming Typing Practice Assistant
